claimText: Peking University's AI use guidelines apply to faculty, students, researchers, and administrators who use generative AI or other AI-assisted tools in teaching, research, and management activities.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: 适用于在教学、科研与管理活动中引入生成式人工智能或其他AI辅助工具的教师、学生、科研人员与管理人员。

citation.citationTitle: 使用规范说明 - AI科研诚信平台
